title: Explain magic constant 65536 for input buffer limit
description: File: tui/src/event.rs, line 738 — input buffer is capped at 65536 bytes with no comment explaining why. Is this arbitrary, a performance limit, or a security boundary? Future contributors modifying input handling need to understand the intent.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
